english_text: A B C D ↔ D C B A
alt_text: A red circle containing eight colored dots arranged so that points labeled A, B, C, D on one side are mirror-paired by green arrows with points labeled A, B, C, D on the other side, illustrating a symmetric/chiastic pairing within a closed structure.
notes: Pedagogical diagram for chiastic (ring) structure in a Quranic surah — pairing elements symmetrically across a central pivot.
